name: eBird India
description: Citizen science platform for recording bird observations; useful for exploring hotspots in and around the Sahyadris.

name: eBird Western Ghats Hotspots
description: Listing of active birding hotspots across the Western Ghats, sorted by species richness and effort.

name: Merlin Bird ID – South Asia Pack
description: Free bird ID app by Cornell Lab; includes call ID and photo-based suggestions for Indian birds.

name: Bird Count India
description: Information on bird monitoring in India, including events and protocols.

name: BNHS
description: Bombay Natural History Society, with publications and resources on Indian birds and conservation.

name: Birds of the Sahyadris (research article)
description: Prakash Gole, 'Birds of the Sahyadri', (1998) 11 (1) Journal of the Ecological Society 5.

name: Avibase checklist
description: Avibase: Bird Checklists of the World - Sahyadri region

name: Birds of Konkan
description: Sahyadri Nisarg Mitra, Birds of Konkan

name: Salim Ali Centre for Ornithology and Natural History
description: National centre for ornithology with research publications and data on Indian birds and ecosystems.

name: Zoological Survey of India – Bird Publications
description: Open-access checklists, monographs and faunal documents on Indian birds.

name: BirdLife International
description: Global species factsheets including distribution maps and conservation assessments.

name: Ecological Society
description: A leading Pune-based organisation, which organises many local and educational activities.

name: Xeno-Canto (Indian Subcontinent)
description: Open-access library of bird sounds (recordings for South Asia included). Playback may be slow in some browsers.

name: Macaulay Library – OBI Collection
description: Collection of the former Oriental Bird Images database, now integrated into the Macaulay Library; over 180,000 Asian bird photographs.
